item.chickens.chicken_catcher.tooltip1: Turns entity chickens into pocket item chickens.
item.chickens.captured_chicken.hint_plac: Use on a block to release.
item.chickens.liquid_egg.tooltip: Right-click to place a water or lava source block.
item.chickens.colored_egg.tooltip: Use on a block to spawn this chicken (same as spawn egg). Cannot be thrown to hatch.
